prompt: A close-up, eye-level shot of a young woman with long, wavy brown hair and front bangs holding up a fluffy, light grey and white kitten directly in front of her face, with only her eyes, nose, and forehead visible behind it. The kitten has wide, curious green eyes, prominent whiskers, and dark tabby markings on its forehead, looking straight into the camera with an alert expression. The woman is wearing a vibrant red top, and the background is filled with lush, dense green bushes and juniper trees under soft, natural outdoor lighting.
